twitter_posts.description:
Introducing AI Browser Games!

Watch open & closed models build small browser games head to head.

Open models like Kimi K2.7 were faster, cheaper, & produced games similar to Opus 4.8. In some cases, open models were ~20x cheaper than closed ones too!

articles.title: It’s worth appreciating a few years ago all LLMs blatantly hallucinated all the time—even if you tried to prompt around it (see “yo be real” for GPT-3). Now it’s rare enough in frontier models people
articles.description:
It’s worth appreciating a few years ago all LLMs blatantly hallucinated all the time—even if you tried to prompt around it (see “yo be real” for GPT-3).

Now it’s rare enough in frontier models people find it interesting you can still make it happen with adversarial shenanigans:

articles.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI

articles.title: GPT-5.6 Sol and Claude Fable 5 try to read “handwriting,” but it’s actually just meaningless scribbles I drew on my phone with my eyes closed. Sol seems to reliably hallucinate an answer. Fable admits
articles.description:
GPT-5.6 Sol and Claude Fable 5 try to read “handwriting,” but it’s actually just meaningless scribbles I drew on my phone with my eyes closed.

Sol seems to reliably hallucinate an answer. Fable admits it can’t read it, or even pushes back and says it’s not actually writing.
